title: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert
summary_full: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
summary_public: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
